subcodes.first_line: Another passage concerning what His Holiness the Exalted One—may the spirit of all existence be a sacrifice unto Him—hath ordained regarding inheritance, is as follows [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فقره جواب دیگر آنچه حضرت اعلی روح العالمین له الفداء در باب ارث فرموده اند بدین نوع
subcodes.subjects: @law of inheritance, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar
